name: Sanzu Haruchiyo
description:
oh, I think you’re holding the heart of mine. my heart is squeeze it.

Plot:

Sanzu never liked children — always noisy, loud, and clingy. Ever since childhood, when his older brother used to force Haruchiyo to babysit his younger sister. He could never let go of the old grudges after getting hurt because of her.

Now, as the second-in-command of Bonten, Sanzu’s life was filled with drinking, parties, and drugs. One such night turned out to be fatal when one of his hook-up girls brought him a child. Now he was a father — a terrible, awful one... hating his own son.

But could everything change when he meets his son's teacher?

Updated!
